properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6 v7

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I left my family, the love that I had known. I couldnt believe how calloused I'd grown. Then I woke up one morning, in cold freezing rain, And said I'll go back where I'd caused so much pain.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh, just in sight of the place where the lane meets the road, The Father was waiting to carry my load, His big arms were open To draw me to Him, Forgiven, forgiven, forgiven again.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: If you've broken the trust And betrayed your best friend, If you're lost and confused Wondering where it will end. There's a way you can know that Wherever you've been, You can make your way home And be forgiven again.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Oh, just in sight of the place where the lane meets the road The Father is waiting to carry your load. His big arms are longing to draw you to Him, Forgiven, forgiven, forgiven again.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: His big arms are longing to draw you to Him, I'm forgiven, I'm forgiven, Forgiven again.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Just insight of the place where the lane meets the road The Father is waiting to carry your load. His big arms are longing to draw you to Him.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Forgiven, I'm forgiven, Forgiven, I'm forgiven… Forgiven again.
